Bash(cat > scripts/README.md << 'EOF'
# Scripts 目录

这个目录包含了 Morgan Code 的实用脚本。

## 可用脚本

### start.sh
一键启动脚本，自动完成以下操作：
- 检查 Rust 环境
- 检查 API Key 配置
- 编译项目（如需要）
- 初始化配置文件
- 启动聊天界面

**使用方法：**
```bash
# 设置 API 密钥
export DEEPSEEK_API_KEY=your-api-key-here

# 运行脚本
./scripts/start.sh

# 强制重新编译
./scripts/start.sh --rebuild
```

**功能特性：**
- ✅ 自动环境检查
- ✅ 智能编译（仅在需要时编译）
- ✅ 友好的彩色输出
- ✅ 配置状态显示
- ✅ 错误提示和帮助信息
EOF
cat scripts/README.md)

Bash(cat << 'EOF'
╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗
║     STREAMING TOOL CALL FIX - COMPLETE ✓                    ║
╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝

🔧 ISSUE FIXED
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Problem: "missing field `name`" error during streaming with tool calls

Root Cause: 
  • In streaming mode, tool call fields arrive incrementally
  • Original structures required all fields to be present
  • Parsing failed when fields were missing in early chunks

Solution:
  • Created separate streaming structures with optional fields
  • DeepSeekStreamToolCall and OpenAIStreamToolCall
  • All fields now use Option<T> and #[serde\(default\)]
  • Gracefully handles partial data in each chunk

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📝 CHANGES MADE
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

src/llm/deepseek.rs:
  • Added DeepSeekStreamToolCall with optional fields
  • Added DeepSeekStreamFunctionCall with optional fields
  • Updated streaming logic to handle None values

src/llm/openai.rs:
  • Added OpenAIStreamToolCall with optional fields
  • Added OpenAIStreamFunctionCall with optional fields
  • Updated streaming logic to handle None values

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Bash(git commit -m "feat: implement streaming response with tool call support

- Add streaming response for DeepSeek and OpenAI providers
- Implement real-time output display with StreamingOutput component
- Add DeepSeek Reasoner reasoning content display \(gray text\)
- Fix tool call parsing in streaming mode with chunk accumulation
- Add comprehensive error handling for incomplete JSON
- Update README with streaming feature documentation

Features:
- Real-time character-by-character output
- Tool calls work seamlessly in streaming mode
- Graceful fallback for non-streaming providers
- Backward compatible with original run\(\) method

Fixes:
- Handle incremental tool call data in streaming
- Validate JSON completeness before parsing
- Continue streaming when tool calls are present
- Skip invalid tool calls with warnings

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>")

Bash(git tag -a v0.2.0-streaming -m "Release v0.2.0: Streaming Response Implementation

Major Features:
- Full streaming response support for DeepSeek and OpenAI
- Real-time output display with reasoning content
- Tool call support in streaming mode
- Comprehensive error handling

This is a stable version with all streaming features tested and working."
